name: protein-engine
description: Protein-Engine MCP server — AI-native protein engineering platform

tools.name: score_sequence
tools.description: Score an amino acid sequence for reprogramming fitness. Returns reprogramming_efficiency, expression_stability, structural_plausibility, safety_score, and composite.

tools.name: evolve
tools.description: Run directed evolution cycles on a seed sequence. Returns promoted variants with fitness scores per generation.

generations.description: Number of evolution generations to run

top_k.description: Number of top candidates to promote per generation

tools.name: search_similar
tools.description: Find protein sequences similar to the query in the vector store. Returns ranked list of (id, similarity) pairs.

k.description: Number of nearest neighbors to return

tools.name: quantum_vqe
tools.description: Run a Variational Quantum Eigensolver (VQE) calculation on a molecule. Returns ground state energy, optimal parameters, and convergence status.

tools.name: ledger_verify
tools.description: Verify the integrity of the cryptographic journal chain. Returns whether the chain is valid and the number of entries.

tools.name: rvf_inspect
tools.description: Inspect an RVF file and return its manifest, segment listing, and capabilities.

tools.name: create_variant
tools.description: Create a new protein variant, embed it, score it, and store it in the vector store. Returns the variant ID, fitness score, and embedding status.

factor.description: Yamanaka factor target (OCT4, SOX2, KLF4, CMYC)
